name: Pgbackweb
tagline: Effortless PostgreSQL backups with a user-friendly web interface!
description:
Effortless PostgreSQL backups with a user-friendly web interface!

Docs: https://github.com/eduardolat/pgbackweb?utm_source=coolify.io

_Template derived from coollabsio/coolify (coolify@e7dff30, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  pgbackweb:
    image: eduardolat/pgbackweb:latest
    volumes:
      - pgbackweb_backups:/backups
    environment:
      - PBW_ENCRYPTION_KEY=6c7492367c57e82643341d8fcd3ae43d
      - PBW_POSTGRES_CONN_STRING=postgresql://ub12dc06df3:364b037aadd16595012c9efe1c0d4e17@postgres:5432/${POSTGRES_DB:-pgbackweb-db}?sslmode=disable
      - TZ=${TIME_ZONE:-UTC}
    depends_on:
      postgres:
        condition: service_healthy
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42095:8085
  postgres:
    image: postgres:17
    environment:
      - POSTGRES_USER=ub12dc06df3
      - POSTGRES_PASSWORD=364b037aadd16595012c9efe1c0d4e17
      - POSTGRES_DB=${POSTGRES_DB:-pgbackweb-db}
    volumes:
      - pgbackweb_postgres_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD-SHELL
        - pg_isready -U ub12dc06df3 -d pgbackweb
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 5
    restart: unless-stopped
volumes:
  pgbackweb_backups: null
  pgbackweb_postgres_data: null
